title: Gateway web UI/dashboard for crowd map (Leaflet.js or similar), confessions feed, telemetry graphs, dead drop admin
close_reason: Implemented dashboard planning in PRFAQ using Rust gateway & Python patterns + CoAP/SenML backend for Leaflet map, confessions, graphs, dead drop admin. 3 codereview passes (no P0-P2 findings; all opinion-level addressed). Gates (cargo check, pytest coap) passed. Closed both beads.
